translation: Say, “He is Allah, the One and Only!”
urdu: کہو کہ وہ (ذات پاک جس کا نام) الله (ہے) ایک ہے

translation: Allah, the eternal and independent Lord and Master on Whom everything in the Universe depends!
He begets not nor is He begotten.
urdu: نہ کسی کا باپ ہے اور نہ کسی کا بیٹا

translation: And there is none comparable to Him.
notes: This Chapter, along with Verse 255 of Chapter 2, gives us a comprehensive divine description of Allah, our Creator, and our Lord.
urdu: اور کوئی اس کا ہمسر نہیں
